summary: Added and tested a dedicated deployment-proof builder that embeds the deny-by-default Cloudflare Pages URL authority classification into the exact proof packet intended for signing and acceptance evaluation.
remaining_blocker: Configure the cloudflare-research GitHub environment with CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID and CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN, then dispatch the deployment workflow.
handoff: Replace the inline proof-construction block in .github/workflows/cloudflare-pages-research.yml with cloudflare-static/build-deployment-proof.mjs, add build-deployment-proof.test.mjs to the contract test step, and require url_authority.valid before evidence acceptance can succeed.
privacy_boundary: No secret values, account IDs, private material, health claims, or user content were stored.
